description_long: This is a pair of open-toed sandals featuring a flat, brown sole and black straps that cross over the top of the foot and around the heel. The straps are secured with visible metallic rivets, adding both structural support and a decorative touch. The sandals have a minimalist design, with no visible branding or logos, and the footbed appears smooth and slightly contoured for comfort. The materials suggest a combination of synthetic leather or rubber for the straps and a denser, possibly foam or rubber, material for the sole. The overall construction is lightweight and suitable for casual urban wear, such as walking on sidewalks or in parks. The sandals are in new condition, with no visible signs of wear or dirt.
description: A pair of brown flat sandals with black cross-over straps and metallic rivet details, designed for casual urban use. The sandals are clean, minimalist, and appear new.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open-toe design, black straps crossing over the foot, and the brown flat soles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin, flat profile of the sole and the way the black straps arch over and around the heel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open heel and the way the straps curve around the back of the foot.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the strap arrangement and the flatness of the sole.
attribute_lacing_style: no laces, slip-on with cross straps
